title: Identify trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect tree features

pcs.text: Observe morphological characteristics of tree specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe morphological characteristics of tree specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe morphological characteristics of tree specimens.

pcs.text: Observe tactile and sensory characteristics of tree specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe tactile and sensory characteristics of tree specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe tactile and sensory characteristics of tree specimens.

pcs.text: Record observations and characteristics according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record observations and characteristics according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record observations and characteristics according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Inspect tree condition

pcs.text: Observe tree general health and structural condition

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe tree general health and structural condition.

pcs.text: Inspect tree specimens for signs and symptoms of pests, diseases and deficiencies that affect tree characteristics

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect tree specimens for signs and symptoms of pests, diseases and deficiencies that affect tree characteristics.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record inspections of tree condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record inspections of tree condition.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare possible tree identification using images, samples and other plant identification resources.

pcs.text: Use characteristics of plant specimens to classify tree to family level and lowest taxonomic ranking

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use characteristics of plant specimens to classify tree to family level and lowest taxonomic ranking.
